description: Create a new Compliance Analysis record in Eramba to document non-compliance for PCI-DSS v4.0 Requirement 6.3.3 ('Req 6.3.3 - Install critical patches within one month of release'). Set the status to 'Not Compliant' and include the following text in the analysis description: "Current patch management process does not meet the 30-day SLA for critical patches. Average deployment time is 47 days. Remediation plan has been submitted to IT Operations with a target compliance date of Q2 2025. Compensating controls include network segmentation and enhanced IDS monitoring on affected systems."
